name: Wild Rice Salad with Sun-Dried Tomato - Al Fresca
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the wild rice in an abundant amount of boiling salted water in a large pot for 35 to 45 minutes or until the grains have almost doubled in size and are tender, but still chewy. Drain the rice in a sieve and run cold water over it to cool. Drain thoroughly.
2. Toast the pine nuts lightly in a dry skillet until tan. Let the nuts cool.
3. Combine the drained wild rice in a bowl with pine nuts, sun-dried tomatoes, black olives, and minced parsley. Toss gently to mix.
